==Biography==

== Trivia ==
* Has played in two Brazilian Championships, in 2012 for [[RMA e-Sports]] and 2014 for [[Team awp]].
* When playing for [[CNB]], he shared the starting jungler position with [[Danagorn]], replacing him in some tournaments. 
* Banned for three months in early 2014 due to scripting.
* Is currently playing Overwatch, as part of [[Team Innova]].<ref>[http://teaminnova.com.br/equipes/overwatch/ Overwatch - Team Innova] ''teaminnova.com.br''</ref>
